evidence.evidence_label: Elite Fourum documents the Black Flame Ninetales distinction and notes collector debate about whether it is an error or original artwork state.

rows.notes: Release context is Jungle secret/chase distribution, but the DB identity modifier should remain edition:first_edition unless a separate release modifier is formally approved.

evidence.evidence_label: Bulbapedia classifies Ivy Pikachu 1st Edition as incorrectly regarded as an error and documents it as intentional secret/chase style distribution in 1st Edition Jungle packs.

Packing/sealing crimp errors vary by individual copy and should remain vault/item-level attributes, not canonical parent lanes.
Bulbapedia catalogs this as a production/misprint phenomenon rather than a stable card identity lane.
Filler and blank cards are production artifacts without normal card identity; route to item-level or separate oddity catalog, not canonical card_prints.
Bulbapedia catalogs this as a production/misprint phenomenon rather than a stable card identity lane.
Holo bleed can occur across many sets in varying degree; only explicitly repeatable named cases should become parent lanes.
Bulbapedia catalogs this as a production/misprint phenomenon rather than a stable card identity lane.
Miscut and off-center cards vary by individual copy and grading standard; they should not create Master Index parent rows.
Bulbapedia catalogs this as a production/misprint phenomenon rather than a stable card identity lane.

Bulbapedia states Rocket’s Minefield Gym was corrected very late in the unlimited print run and that corrected unlimited copies are rarer.
